name: Caravaneer 2
short_description: A post-apocalyptic trade simulation game with turn based isometric combats. The game features detailed economics simulation and a rich branching story where your choices actually matter.
detailed_description:
A post-apocalyptic trade simulation game with turn based isometric combat. The game features detailed economics simulation and a rich branching story where your choices actually matter.

The main mechanics of the game consists of transporting goods from one settlement to the next in a hostile post-apocalyptic desert where you need to ensure survival of yourself and your crew and take care of your animals, carts and vehicles. You are in constant risk of getting lost in the desert and dying of thirst and hunger or being attacked and killed by bandits.

It's an indie project originally released in 2014. It utilizes old school visuals and challenging gameplay that resembles games from the 90's and 80's

The Steam release includes 4 of the original DLC and contains a number of minor bug fixes and user experience improvements

supported_languages: English, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
